entity.label: Ibzan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Illustrious, the tenth judge of Israel (Judg. 12:8-10). He ruled seven years.

nodes.label: Ibzan
nodes.description: Illustrious, the tenth judge of Israel (Judg. 12:8-10). He ruled seven years.

verses.text: And after him Ibzan of Bethlehem judged Israel.
Then died Ibzan, and was buried at Bethlehem.
